commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Iniquity. It is become natural to them. (St. Jerome)
They cannot lay the blame on the violence of passion. They sin on purpose. (Calmet)
Septuagint, "they have not left off, (6.) in order to be converted. Usury upon usury; fraud upon fraud; they "(Haydock)
